name: nif_emisor
description: NIF (VAT number) of the invoice issuer
notes: Must be a valid Spanish NIF/NIE format

name: base_imponible
notes: May be required in some versions

name: cuota_iva
notes: May be required in some versions

name: nif_destinatario
description: NIF (VAT number) of the invoice receiver
notes: May be required for B2B invoices

name: serie_factura
notes: May be separate from invoice number

position: # - All string fields should be trimmed and NFC-normalized

# - Confirm the separator character (| or ; or other)
